items.title: Suspect killed after opening fire on Secret Service near White House
items.summary: Officials say a suspect approached a checkpoint near the building and opened fire, and that a bystander was wounded.

items.title: Trump says Iran deal 'largely negotiated' including reopening Strait of Hormuz
items.summary: Tehran also signals progress on talks but says the key issue of nuclear weapons is not part of an initial framework it is working on.

items.title: Rosenberg: Luhansk strike sparks Russian accusations and vow to retaliate
items.summary: Eighteen people were killed and 42 others injured in the strike on the town in Russian-occupied eastern Ukraine.

items.title: Retail spending fell in March as consumers pull back
items.summary: Spending at US retailers fell in March as consumers pulled back amid recessionary fears fueled by the banking crisis.

items.title: 英廉航機師疑3萬英呎空中心臟病發作 乘客被迫受困機場逾13小時
items.summary: 英國廉航Jet2航空公司一架從大西洋特內里費島飛往英國伯明罕的班機發生空中驚魂，機師在3萬英呎高空疑似心臟病發作，導致航機緊急迫降葡萄牙，大批乘客受困機場超過13小時。  《...…

items.title: 850艘巨輪困波斯灣！全球1/5石油命脈受阻 英出動無人艦預演掃雷
items.summary: 中東戰火尚未結束，西方國家已提前開始預演「戰後重開荷姆茲海峽」。英國軍方近日公開部署計畫，準備派遣具備自主掃雷能力的艦艇與無人系統前往中東，協助清除可能存在於荷姆茲海峽的水雷威...…

items.title: 樹木哭了！日本秋田預防熊害 將砍掉18校361棵樹
items.summary: 日本秋田縣教育委員會為了防止師生遭到熊隻襲擊，將在今年砍掉14所高中、4所特教學校周圍共361棵樹木，其中有許多是建校時所種植的，陪著學校一起成長至今。  據《讀賣新聞》報導...…
